channel.title: Devops on History
channel.description: Recent content in Devops on History

item.title: K8sPatterns.12 Stateful Service
item.description: 고유하고 교체 불가능한 인스턴스로 구성된 스테이트풀 애플리케이션을 Kubernetes에서 운영하는 방법 — StatefulSet, Headless Service, PVC까지.

item.title: Operating a Kubernetes Cluster: rollout, delete, apply
item.description: kubectl commands that change cluster state — rollout, delete, apply — walked through with a real failed deployment and rollback on a live cluster.

item.title: Reading a Kubernetes Cluster: config, get, describe, logs
item.description: kubectl commands look like a random pile of subcommands until you split them into verbs and nouns — walked through with a real pending pod from a live cluster.

item.title: K8sPatterns.10 Singleton Service
item.description: 분산 환경에서 단 하나의 인스턴스만 활성화되도록 보장하는 방법 — Out-of-Application Locking부터 분산 락, PodDisruptionBudget까지.

item.title: K8sPatterns.09 Daemon Service
item.description: DaemonSet ensures one Pod per node for infra daemons — nodeSelector, scheduling evolution from nodeName to nodeAffinity, and comparison with Static Pods.

item.title: K8sPatterns.08 Periodic Job
item.description: Batch Job 패턴에 시간 차원을 더한 CronJob — schedule, concurrencyPolicy, startingDeadlineSeconds까지.

item.title: K8sPatterns.07 Batch Job
item.description: 격리된 원자적 작업 단위를 안정적으로 실행하기 위한 Job 리소스 — completions, parallelism, Indexed Job까지.

item.title: K8sPatterns.06 Automated Placement
item.description: How the Kubernetes scheduler assigns Pods to nodes using predicates, priorities, node affinity, pod affinity, taints and tolerations for optimal placement.

item.title: K8sPatterns.05 Managed Lifecycle
item.description: How Kubernetes communicates lifecycle events to containers via SIGTERM, SIGKILL, postStart, preStop hooks, and init containers for graceful startup and shutdown.

item.title: K8sPatterns.04 Health Probe Pattern
item.description: A deep dive into Kubernetes Health Probe pattern: Process Health Check, Liveness Probe, and Readiness Probe for building self-healing cloud-native applications.
